channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Bootstrapped with AI in 2026
item.description: Ship a SaaS in 2026 with 4 AI tools under $50/month — Cursor, GitHub Copilot Workspace, Zed AI, and Codeium Enterprise benchmarks and real failures

item.title: 6 signals to watch in LLM pipelines
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline outages 46% with 6 metrics that break first — prompt length, token budget, latency, retrieval cost, generation tokens, and cache hit ratio.

item.title: AI stacks that shipped: 3 real products made in 2026
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with FastAPI + Fly.io + Neon Postgres — the solo stack that shipped real products in 2026 and the hidden costs most teams miss.

item.title: Production-grade AI: 5 patterns that survive
item.description: Cut AI response time 60% with Redis Streams, circuit breakers, and idempotency keys — the boring patterns that survive model failures and rate limits in 2026.

item.title: Choose the Right Real-Time Protocol in 60 Seconds
item.description: Pick the right realtime protocol in 90 seconds — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks, code, and the one mistake that cost me three weeks.

item.title: Vector DBs: the 0.5ms vs 50ms performance split
item.description: Cut vector search latency from 45 ms to 3 ms with Milvus 2.4.5 or keep pgvector 0.7.0 for under 50M vectors and $560/month infrastructure

item.title: AI answer latency: 80ms or bust
item.description: Cut RAG answer latency from 1.4s to 68ms — the retrieval tricks tutorials skip: early-exit search, sharding, and a 2-stage BM25+vector pipeline. All pinned versions, real AWS savings, and the profiling tool we wish we’d used first.

item.title: Message queues: use them only here
item.description: Save $18k/month and 4 hours of debugging: when message queues actually help—and when they burn your budget. Real benchmarks, failure modes, and a step-by-step Python example with Redis Streams 7.2.

item.title: No CS degree? Build systems anyway
item.description: Build systems without a CS degree: three real services, benchmarks, and cost savings from 2026. Ship, measure, debug—senior-level impact without the gatekeeping.

item.title: 50% less carbon, same speed: real trade-offs
item.description: Cut API carbon footprint 53% without adding latency — schema audits, Bun on ARM, and CPU frequency scaling in real numbers.

item.title: Ace remote interviews: self-taught guide
item.description: Self-taught engineers pass remote tech interviews in 2026 by building one live system, explaining trade-offs, and mastering cost-aware systems thinking—not LeetCode alone. 3 real systems, latency and cost numbers included.

item.title: What MCP servers actually do
item.description: Cut tool sprawl costs 62% with MCP servers — cold start, memory, and failure modes most teams miss before shipping to production

item.title: Wrong max pool size? DB chokes under load
item.description: Cut database pool costs 40%: the real max pool size formula for PostgreSQL 16.2, HikariCP 5.0.1, and pg-pool v3.6 — connection churn, memory overhead, and latency traps exposed.

item.title: Architecture or bust: when simple wins
item.description: Cut AWS bill 95% and ship 3x faster by replacing microservices with a monolith — real numbers, real code, and the architecture trap most teams fall for in 2026.

item.title: Optimize Node 22 for 5G mobile backends
item.description: Cut Node 22 API latency 91% on 5G — pgBouncer timeouts, DNS pinning, and heap caps that actually save money in Jakarta and Dublin.

item.title: Portfolio beats projects: 2026 remote hire hack
item.description: Portfolio beats projects: one system with monitoring and a runbook gets remote hires from Africa in 2026. Live demo, 150ms latency, 3.2x interview rate.

item.title: I tripled my salary in 18 months
item.description: From $1,200 to $145k: how one engineer used latency optimization to land a US remote role with 0.2% RSUs and $15k signing bonus in 18 months.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost lands
item.description: Turn public rate data into a 2.0x salary bump — Puppeteer 22.6 scrapers, 2026 benchmarks, and negotiation scripts for lower-cost countries

item.title: Freelance burnout’s hidden cause
item.description: Freelance dev burnout: how I fixed it in 8 weeks with data, contracts, and a recovery protocol. Tracked decision fatigue, expert tax, and maintenance time to prove what works.

item.title: Thermal Throttling When Running 7B LLMs Locally
item.description: Run LLMs locally without melting your GPU — 2–18 tokens/sec benchmarks, thermal throttling fixes, and a 16 GB RAM cutoff for RAG on laptops in 2026.
